column1: Questions
Are there any rubbish bins in the city that urgently need to be emptied?
What tourist spots can I visit in the city today?
I have an electric car. Where can I charge it right now?
Are there any street lights in the city that are currently switched off or not working?
Which emergency vehicles are currently available to respond?
Are any public buses running late right now?
Is the air quality around the city acceptable right now?
Where can I park my car in the city right now?
Is the city centre busy with traffic right now?
I use a wheelchair. Which attractions in the city are accessible to me today?
I want to visit something interesting today. Is there somewhere I can also find parking nearby?
I want to go for a run outside. Are there parts of the city with little traffic and clean air?
I need to charge my electric car but I'd rather avoid congested streets. Where should I head?
I've heard some parts of the city have bad traffic right now. Are there tourist spots in a less congested area?
There seems to be a big traffic jam somewhere. Are emergency services available in that area?
I want to spend the afternoon somewhere the air is clean. Is there anything worth visiting there?
I'm a city worker doing rounds. Which areas have both overflowing bins and heavy traffic at the same time?
I want to drive into the city without getting stuck in traffic. Where are there still free parking spots?
I've heard the air quality is bad in some parts of the city. Are there free parking spots somewhere the air is clean?
The bus I take to work is running late. Is there a lot of traffic along its usual route?
I want to take my kids somewhere nice today. Are there things to visit in an area where the air is clean?
Which parts of the city have both street lights switched off and bins that haven't been emptied?
I'm nearly out of battery and I'd like to visit something. Is there a charger close to any open attraction?
Are there buildings in parts of the city where the environment seems unhealthy right now?
I want to spend a nice afternoon out. Where in the city has clean air, something interesting to see, and parking available?
I'm driving in for a bit of sightseeing. Where should I go to avoid heavy traffic, find something to visit, and park easily?
I'm in a wheelchair and want to go out today. I need somewhere accessible, with decent air quality and a parking spot.
Which parts of the city are in the worst shape right now, with street lights off, full bins, and traffic problems all at once?
The city feels chaotic today. Where is there heavy congestion, delayed public transport, and few emergency units available?
I want somewhere funny to go, with something to do and a place to park. What would you suggest?
Which buildings in the city are consuming the most energy right now?
Are there any open citizen complaints that still need to be handled?
I need a fast charger that is free at the moment. Where is one?
Which fire engines are on duty in the city today?
Are any environmental sensors currently raising an alert?
Are there any accessible parking spaces reserved for disabled drivers available now?
Which trams are currently in service across the city?
Has any road incident been detected by the traffic sensors right now?
Show me the full details of the bin that is currently overflowing.
Give me the complete energy profile of the first healthcare building in the city.
Tell me everything about the first charging station that is both available and fast.
Open the first open citizen report and show me its full description.
Show me the full details of the first medical unit, including its crew and vehicle code.
Show me the readings of the first sensor with an active alert.
Find the first electric parking spot and tell me its exact location and hourly price.
Show me the details of the first bus carrying more than 50 passengers, including its route.
Pick the first attraction in the list and give me its opening hours and ticket price.
Show me the detailed congestion data for the first road sensor that has detected an incident.
A citizen report has been handled. Mark the first open report as resolved.
One street light is malfunctioning. Switch it back on.
Take the faulty charging station offline for maintenance.
Reassign an available emergency unit to standby status.
The overflowing bin has just been emptied. Update its fill level.
Temporarily close the attraction that has the longest waiting time.
A sensor has run out of battery and is offline. Remove it from the system.
Mark the parking spot that just got taken as no longer available.
There is an area with dangerous air quality then lower the speed limit across that zone.
Pollution is high in area of the city. Raise parking prices there to discourage driving.
Street lighting should be increased in the zone where a serious road incident has occurred.
Following a major incident all available emergency units must be dispatched to the area.
Due to severe traffic gridlock public the transit services in the area must be suspended.
A security threat was reported in an area. Close all attractions in that zone.
A severe weather alert is active in one zone. Mark its attractions as temporarily closed.
Fog has been detected in an area. Reduce the speed limit across that zone.
I drive an electric car to work. Which buildings have high energy use and a charger nearby?
People keep reporting waste problems. Are there overflowing bins where those reports come from?
Residents complained about lighting. Are the street lights actually off in those areas?
There are complaints about road damage. Do the traffic sensors confirm problems there?
A sensor is flagging a gas alert. Are there emergency units available in that area?
I'm heading to a busy office building. Is there parking available near it?
I want to park and ride into town. Where can I park near a bus that's running?
I need to charge my car and then park it. Where can I do both close together?
I want to reach an attraction by public transport. Which open attractions have a bus nearby?
Which busy buildings are in areas where the bins are also overflowing?
It's getting dark. Are there areas with both broken street lights and heavy traffic?
There may be an evacuation. Which crowded buildings have emergency units nearby?
I want clean air on my commute. Which bus routes pass through low-pollution areas?
Several emergencies are reported. Are there citizen reports describing what happened there?
I commute by electric car. Where is the air clean, with a charger and a parking spot?
Residents reported problems. Which areas have complaints, overflowing bins and broken lights at once?
A serious incident happened. Where is there congestion, citizen reports and available emergency units?
I'm a tourist with no car. Where can I find a bus, parking and something open to visit?
I want a green commute. Where is the air clean, traffic light and a bus running?
I'm an EV commuter. Which office areas have a charger and free parking nearby?
Is any area unsafe tonight, with lights off, heavy traffic and few emergency units?
I want an eco-friendly day out. Where is the air clean, an attraction open and a bus available?
I'm a maintenance worker. Which zones have full bins, open complaints and traffic issues together?
I want a clean EV stop. Where is a free charger, good air quality and an available parking spot?
Plan me a perfect afternoon: good air quality, an open attraction, parking and a bus nearby.
Find where a road incident is, see which emergency unit is free there, and show me its details.
Since the air quality in that area has dropped sharply from a pollution spike, we should lower the speed limit and raise parking prices.
Inspect the most congested zone, find a free emergency unit there and dispatch it.
Find the building using the most energy, inspect it and flag it for an energy audit.
Since the bus is experiencing continuous delays we need to locate the gridlock on its route and suspend service in that specific area.
Triage the oldest open citizen report: read its full details and mark it as in progress.
My name is Marco Rossi and I'm reporting this now: the street light on Corso Garibaldi in the city centre has been broken for days. Please open a new report.
This is Giulia Bianchi. Right now there's a large pile of illegally dumped rubbish next to Piazza Risorgimento in the north of the city, and I'd like to file a new complaint about it.
I'm Luca Verdi and I want to open a report today about a deep pothole on Via Appia Antica in the southern district that keeps damaging cars.
My name is Anna Esposito. I'm reporting an act of vandalism I just witnessed at the bus terminal in the east of the city, and I want it logged as a new safety report.
This is Paolo Neri. There's a persistent foul smell, probably a sewage leak, on Viale dei Rettori in the city centre right now, and I'd like to submit a new environmental complaint.
